## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:roles` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] If the schema changed, a Prisma migration is included (`prisma/migrations/...`)
- [ ] `docs/FEATURES-CHECKLIST.md` and `docs/CONTEXT-ANCHOR.md` updated
- [ ] No secrets, real M-Pesa keys, or `.env` values committed
